blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
